'''labozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huanzalaite|huanzalaite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huanzalaite|huanzalaite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| labozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læbezheth|læbezheth]] || [[word:læbezhej|læbezhej]] || [[word:læbezhesh|læbezhesh]] || [[word:læbezhe|læbezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:labobozhoth|labobozhoth]] || [[word:labobozhoj|labobozhoj]] || [[word:labobozhosh|labobozhosh]] || [[word:labobozho|labobozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:labozhoth|labozhoth]] || [[word:labozhoj|labozhoj]] || [[word:labozhosh|labozhosh]] || [[word:labozho|labozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:labofzhoth|labofzhoth]] || [[word:labofzhoj|labofzhoj]] || [[word:labofzhosh|labofzhosh]] || [[word:labofzhof|labofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:labozhotho|labozhotho]] || [[word:labozhojo|labozhojo]] || [[word:labozhosho|labozhosho]] || [[word:labozhoko|labozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:labozhoth|labozhoth]] || [[word:labozhoj|labozhoj]] || [[word:labozhosh|labozhosh]] || [[word:labozho|labozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:labozhothol|labozhothol]] || [[word:labozhojol|labozhojol]] || [[word:labozhoshol|labozhoshol]] || [[word:labozhokol|labozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:labozhothotho|labozhothotho]] || [[word:labozhojojo|labozhojojo]] || [[word:labozhoshosho|labozhoshosho]] || [[word:labozhoko|labozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:labozhothon|labozhothon]] || [[word:labozhojon|labozhojon]] || [[word:labozhoshon|labozhoshon]] || [[word:labozhokon|labozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:labozhothoro|labozhothoro]] || [[word:labozhojoro|labozhojoro]] || [[word:labozhoshoro|labozhoshoro]] || [[word:labozhokoro|labozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
